title: SourceBuildStrategy
description: Source-to-Image (S2I) build strategy that combines application source with a builder image to produce a runnable image.

scripts.description: URL of S2I scripts to use instead of the ones in the builder image.

incremental.description: Attempt to perform an incremental build reusing artifacts from a prior build.

forcePull.description: Overrides the default pull behavior and forces a pull of the builder image before the build.
